name: Character Creation Assistant
description:
This is my own personal bot that I use for help when creating characters, usually with condensing information or for inspiration on formatting it within my templates. Its purpose is very specific, but I decided to make it public because of two reasons. One, it could maybe be useful to someone. And two, because I'm trying to publish some of my many private bots, and this one was a no brainer lol. Hope you find some use in the little guy, I know they've served me well.

(Image made by me, of one of my OCs)
creator: denjidenji
